title: bromus glomeratus
intro: Bromus glomeratus, also known as clustered brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Bromus glomeratus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
